ack.detail: MLLP listener is configured Auto-generate (Before processing); HL7 response generation uses AA, AE and AR codes.
ack.evidence: ENHT | PAS In | 7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06 | canonical/ENHT/PAS In.xml | sourceConnector lines 9-55 and HL7 responseGenerationProperties lines 72-82

field_map.note: primary patient XSLT and HospitalNumber JavaScript select FACIL identifier
middle name appended to FirstName; title case-normalized
F and M retained, all other values become U

field_map.source: PID-11.1-.7 of P, HOME, CORR or TMP repetitions
field_map.note: maps address components; default Country GB and Type HOME
numeric phone validation and length under 21; primary uses MOB and Internet values
NKN becomes Z; death date formatted YYYY-MM-DD
GP code truncated to eight characters
constructs Scheduled, Did Not Attend, transfer, departure, attendance, arrival or discharge status text
used for merge and the A40 secondary Patient createOnly request

evidence.claim: Builds a QBP^Q21 message from the HTTP request, assigns MSH timestamp and message ID, and places hosnum or nhsnum into QPD-3.1.

evidence.claim: Sends the encoded HL7 query over MLLP to a configured remote TCP endpoint, and only continues when QPD-3.1 is non-empty.
evidence.location: ENHT | PAS Out | cbc80f6b-73ad-491b-adc6-602ed5705c8b | canonical/ENHT/PAS Out.xml | destination Send Q21 properties and filter lines 156-396

evidence.claim: Converts the Send Q21 response to XML, then transforms K21 response segments to Patient XML before returning it from the HTTP response path.
evidence.location: ENHT | PAS Out | cbc80f6b-73ad-491b-adc6-602ed5705c8b | canonical/ENHT/PAS Out.xml | Convert K21 to XML lines 397-535 and Create response XSLT lines 536-831

notes: No OpenEyes API call. The source HTTP endpoint is unauthenticated; the channel is a synchronous HTTP-to-MLLP demographic query bridge.
